usageHint: For raw GitHub URLs, use: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DamoBird365/microsoft-cloud-icons/master/{svg|png path}

icons.name: Word
icons.description: Word processor for creating, editing, and sharing documents with rich formatting and collaboration features.

icons.name: Excel
icons.description: Spreadsheet application for data analysis, calculations, charts, and business intelligence.

icons.name: PowerPoint
icons.description: Presentation tool for creating slide decks with animations, transitions, and design templates.

icons.name: Outlook
icons.description: Email, calendar, and contacts application for communication and scheduling.

icons.name: Teams
icons.description: Collaboration hub for chat, video meetings, file sharing, and app integration.

icons.name: SharePoint
icons.description: Intranet and content management platform for team sites, document libraries, and workflows.

icons.name: OneDrive
icons.description: Cloud storage service for saving, syncing, and sharing files across devices.

icons.name: OneNote
icons.description: Digital notebook for capturing and organising notes, drawings, and clippings.

icons.name: Access
icons.description: Desktop database application for building custom database solutions and forms.

icons.name: Publisher
icons.description: Desktop publishing tool for creating professional layouts like newsletters, flyers, and brochures.

icons.name: Visio
icons.description: Diagramming tool for flowcharts, org charts, floor plans, and network diagrams.

icons.name: Project
icons.description: Project management tool for scheduling, resource allocation, and tracking project progress.

icons.name: Loop
icons.description: Co-creation app with portable components that sync across Microsoft 365 apps in real time.

icons.name: Lists
icons.description: Smart tracking app for organising information with customisable views, rules, and alerts.

icons.name: Forms
icons.description: Survey and quiz builder for collecting feedback, registrations, and responses.

icons.name: Planner
icons.description: Task management app for creating plans, assigning tasks, and tracking team progress with visual boards.

icons.name: Stream
icons.description: Enterprise video service for uploading, sharing, and managing video content securely.

icons.name: Clipchamp
icons.description: Video editor for creating and editing videos with templates, effects, and screen recording.

icons.name: Sway
icons.description: Interactive presentation and storytelling app that creates polished, responsive web-based content.

icons.name: Bookings
icons.description: Online scheduling tool that lets customers book appointments and meetings directly.

icons.name: To Do
icons.description: Personal task management app for organising daily tasks with smart suggestions and My Day planning.

icons.name: Whiteboard
icons.description: Digital canvas for visual collaboration, brainstorming, and ideation in meetings.

icons.name: Delve
icons.description: Content discovery tool that surfaces relevant documents and content from across your organisation.

icons.name: Places
icons.description: Workplace coordination app for managing hybrid work, room booking, and office presence.

icons.name: Calendar
icons.description: Calendar app for managing and sharing schedules, events, and meetings.

icons.name: Microsoft 365
icons.description: The integrated suite of productivity apps, cloud services, and security for businesses and individuals.

icons.name: Power Apps
icons.description: Low-code platform for building custom business applications with drag-and-drop design and connectors.

icons.name: Power Automate
icons.description: Workflow automation tool for creating automated flows between apps, services, and data sources.

icons.name: Power BI
icons.description: Business analytics service for interactive visualisations, dashboards, and data-driven insights.

icons.name: Power Pages
icons.description: Low-code platform for building secure, data-driven external-facing business websites.

icons.name: Power Platform
icons.description: The unified suite comprising Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI, Power Pages, and Copilot Studio.

icons.name: Copilot Studio
icons.description: Low-code tool for building custom AI copilots and chatbots with generative AI capabilities.

icons.name: AI Builder
icons.description: AI capability for Power Platform that lets you add intelligence with prebuilt or custom AI models.

icons.name: Dataverse
icons.description: Cloud-scale data platform that securely stores and manages data used by business applications.

icons.name: Power Fx
icons.description: Low-code programming language based on Excel-like formulas, used across Power Platform.

icons.name: Connectors
icons.description: Pre-built integrations that connect Power Platform to hundreds of apps, services, and data sources.

icons.name: Agent 365
icons.description: AI-powered autonomous agents that execute business processes and tasks on behalf of users.

icons.name: Agent Builder
icons.description: Built-in experience in Microsoft 365 Copilot for creating and sharing declarative agents using natural language or manual configuration.

icons.name: Dynamics 365
icons.description: Suite of intelligent business applications for ERP and CRM across sales, service, finance, and operations.

icons.name: Business Central
icons.description: Business management solution for SMBs covering finance, supply chain, sales, and project management.

icons.name: Sales
icons.description: CRM application for managing customer relationships, pipelines, and sales insights with AI.

icons.name: Customer Service
icons.description: Omnichannel customer support platform with case management, knowledge base, and AI-driven insights.

icons.name: Contact Center
icons.description: Copilot-first cloud contact center with omnichannel support, AI agents, and unified routing.

icons.name: Field Service
icons.description: Service management for scheduling, dispatching, and managing on-site work orders and technicians.

icons.name: Finance
icons.description: Financial management application for automating accounting, budgeting, and global financial operations.

icons.name: Finance & Operations
icons.description: Cross-app capabilities for Dynamics 365 finance and operations applications.

icons.name: Supply Chain Management
icons.description: Operations management for manufacturing, warehousing, inventory, and supply chain planning.

icons.name: Commerce
icons.description: Unified commerce platform for managing retail operations across online and in-store channels.

icons.name: Project Operations
icons.description: End-to-end project management from sales to delivery, combining project accounting and resource management.

icons.name: Customer Voice
icons.description: Feedback management tool for creating surveys and capturing customer sentiment at scale.

icons.name: Customer Insights
icons.description: Customer data platform combining unified profiles with real-time journey orchestration for personalised experiences.

icons.name: Human Resources
icons.description: HR management for employee self-service, benefits, leave, compensation, and workforce analytics.

icons.name: Intelligent Order Management
icons.description: Order orchestration platform for managing fulfilment across multiple channels and partners.

icons.name: Sales Insights
icons.description: AI-driven sales intelligence with conversation analytics, relationship insights, and predictive scoring.

icons.name: Microsoft Copilot
icons.description: AI-powered assistant that uses large language models to help with tasks across Microsoft products and Microsoft 365.

icons.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot
icons.description: The Copilot experience embedded in Microsoft 365 apps — the swoosh icon with the M365 badge, as seen in the app store and Teams.

icons.name: Microsoft Entra
icons.description: Product family for identity and network access management, securing connections across cloud and on-premises.

icons.name: Entra ID
icons.description: Cloud identity service (formerly Azure AD) for authentication, single sign-on, and conditional access.

icons.name: Entra ID Governance
icons.description: Identity governance for automating access requests, reviews, and lifecycle management at scale.

icons.name: Entra Verified ID
icons.description: Decentralised identity service for issuing and verifying privacy-respecting digital credentials.

icons.name: Defender
icons.description: Unified security platform for threat protection across endpoints, email, identities, and cloud apps.

icons.name: Purview
icons.description: Data governance and compliance solution for information protection, data loss prevention, and risk management.

icons.name: Viva Suite
icons.description: Employee experience platform that brings together communications, knowledge, learning, and insights.

icons.name: Viva Connections
icons.description: Personalised gateway to the digital workplace with company news, conversations, and resources.

icons.name: Viva Insights
icons.description: Workplace analytics providing data-driven insights to improve productivity and wellbeing.

icons.name: Viva Learning
icons.description: Learning hub that aggregates training content from multiple providers into the flow of work.

icons.name: Viva Engage
icons.description: Social engagement platform (formerly Yammer) for communities, conversations, and leadership communication.

icons.name: Viva Amplify
icons.description: Corporate communications tool for creating, publishing, and measuring internal campaigns.

icons.name: Viva Pulse
icons.description: Lightweight survey tool for managers to gather regular team feedback and track sentiment.

icons.name: Viva Glint
icons.description: Employee engagement survey platform with people-science-driven questions and action planning.

icons.name: Viva Home
icons.description: Central dashboard for the Viva employee experience platform, surfacing personalised content and insights.

icons.name: Microsoft Fabric
icons.description: Unified data analytics platform combining data engineering, warehousing, science, and real-time analytics in one SaaS experience.

icons.name: Microsoft Edge
icons.description: Chromium-based web browser with built-in AI, security features, and enterprise management.

icons.name: Bing
icons.description: Microsoft's search engine, now enhanced with AI-powered chat and content generation.

icons.name: Designer
icons.description: AI-powered graphic design app for creating social media posts, invitations, and visual content.

icons.name: Office
icons.description: The classic Office brand encompassing the core productivity applications.

icons.name: Microsoft Foundry
icons.description: Innovation programme connecting startups with enterprise customers to co-develop solutions.

icons.name: Family Safety
icons.description: Digital safety app for families with screen time management, content filtering, and location sharing.

icons.name: Admin Center
icons.description: Web portal for managing Microsoft 365 subscriptions, users, groups, and service settings.
